compiled_state.title: GREEN: Update debug-everything/SKILL.md to handle MAX_AGENTS unlimited|N|0 protocol
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md to handle the 3-tier MAX_AGENTS protocol:
- MAX_AGENTS: unlimited → dispatch all candidates with no artificial ceiling
- MAX_AGENTS: N → cap batch at N
- MAX_AGENTS: 0 → skip dispatch, write ticket comment

Replace "batches of up to 5 sub-agents", "at most 5 Task calls" with protocol-aware language.
Document rationale for whether context-check integration is needed (decision: if excluded, add rationale comment).

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to "5 sub-agents" or "batches of 5" in debug-everything/SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -qi "5 sub-agents\|batches of.*5\|at most 5 Task" plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill eval passes after update
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Updated SKILL.md with 3-tier MAX_AGENTS protocol (unlimited|N|0). Removed all hardcoded '5 sub-agents'/'batches of 5' references. Added context-check integration rationale. Updated eval rubrics from RED to GREEN state. Skill eval passes 8/8 (100%).
comments.author: Test
